PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-31-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lisa Tandoc, for petitioner Digna P. Gonzales.

Ms. Tandoc stated that she had been in contact with all beneficiaries, and that no one had raised an objection. The Court granted the petition for probate of will (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not reported)
